/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/kyber-ir.dir/llvm-gen.cpp.o" -o kyber-ir  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-20/lib /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangFrontend.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangDriver.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangSerialization.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangCodeGen.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangParse.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangSema.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangAnalysis.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangEdit.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangLex.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangFrontend.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangDriver.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangParse.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangSerialization.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangSema.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangEdit.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangAPINotes.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangAnalysis.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangLex.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-20/lib/libLLVM.so.1
